assertions.description: The PCB analyzer correctly reports dfm_tier='standard' for the base board with min_track_width=0.2032mm and min_drill=0.254mm, no violations. Despite the board being KiCad v4 format and missing board outline detection, the DFM metrics are correctly extracted from track and pad data. The 147 footprints, 308 track segments, 36 vias, and routing completeness (0 unrouted nets) are all accurately reported.
